caption: The video captures a formal presentation by Joseph Quinlan, the Chief Market Strategist of Bank of America's Investment Strategy Group, at an event hosted by the Institute of International and European Affairs (IIEA) on June 15, 2017. Quinlan stands confidently at a podium, dressed in a dark suit and red tie, addressing an attentive audience seated in front of him. The backdrop features the IIEA logo and a large screen displaying the title of his talk: "The End of the West? – The Stakes for the US and Europe in a World of Disorder." The setting is well-lit, with natural light streaming through a window behind the speaker, creating a professional and engaging atmosphere. The audience, composed of formally dressed individuals, appears to be listening intently as Quinlan delivers his insights on global economic and political trends.
